name: overwhelm-surround
title: Overwhelm Surround
description: Tasks, tabs, pings, and notification bubbles accelerate inward around a calm central subject, turning overload into visible spatial pressure.

variables.label: Chip count
variables.description: Number of tasks and notifications crowding the center.

variables.label: Center label
variables.description: Text inside the calm central subject. Blank hides the text.

variables.label: Intensity
variables.description: How tightly and quickly the chips crowd the center.
